# TipWalk

> Connect travelers with passionate local guides. Book free walking tours in 35+ cities across Europe.

TipWalk is a platform for discovering and booking free walking tours led by knowledgeable local guides. Tours have no upfront cost — travelers tip guides at the end based on their experience.

## What Is TipWalk?

TipWalk was founded in 2018 to make authentic travel accessible to everyone. We connect curious travelers with passionate local guides across 35+ cities, primarily in Europe. Our tip-based model keeps tours free to join while ensuring guides are rewarded for quality experiences.

## For Travelers

- Browse free walking tours by city, language, date, and duration
- Book instantly — no upfront payment required
- Cancel for free up to 24 hours before the tour
- Tip your guide at the end based on your experience (typical: €10–20 per person)
- Read verified reviews from other travelers before booking
- Tours available in English, Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, and more

## For Guides

- Apply to become a guide by creating a profile and designing your first tour
- Get approved and start accepting bookings from travelers worldwide
- Earn tips directly from travelers
- Set your own schedule and tour frequency
- Use credits to access premium features that boost visibility:
  - Featured Listings (appear at top of search results)
  - Search Boost (higher ranking in city pages)
  - Profile Highlight (eye-catching badge)
  - Priority Placement (premium positioning)
  - Advanced Analytics (detailed tour insights)

## Platform Statistics

- 50,000+ travelers served
- 2,500+ local guides
- 35+ cities covered
- 48,567 verified reviews
- 4.8 / 5 average rating
- 98% of travelers would recommend TipWalk

## Credits System

Credits are the platform currency used by guides to unlock premium features. Key facts:
- Purchased in packages (various tiers available)
- Credits never expire
- No refunds on purchased credits
- Used only by guides — travelers book for free

## Key Pages

- `/` — Home: search tours, featured cities, top-rated tours
- `/tours` — Browse and filter all available tours
- `/tours/[id]` — Individual tour detail, schedule, and booking
- `/how-it-works` — Step-by-step guide for travelers and guides
- `/become-guide` — Apply to become a local guide
- `/reviews` — Authentic traveler reviews and ratings
- `/about` — Our story, mission, values, and team
- `/faq` — Frequently asked questions for travelers and guides
- `/contact` — Reach our support team
- `/privacy` — Privacy policy (GDPR, CCPA, CNIL compliant)
- `/terms` — Terms of service (governed by French law)
- `/login` — Sign in (not indexed)
- `/register` — Create an account (not indexed)

## Company

- Founded: 2018
- Headquarters: Barcelona, Spain
- Additional offices: Berlin, Germany; New York, USA
- Governing law: France
- Contact: support@tipwalk.com

## Technical Notes

- Built with Next.js (App Router), React, TypeScript, Supabase, and Stripe
- Authentication via Supabase Auth (email/password, Google, GitHub OAuth)
- Payments processed via Stripe (credit packages for guides)
- Tour tips paid directly by travelers to guides in cash or via digital payment
